scope: docs-only Desktop Task Thread design checkpoint for FR #92 covering #96-#99

desktop_taste.summary: 用于桌面任务工作台布局、方向稿落库和 DESIGN.md 结构判断。

changed_truth.vision: VISION.md now defines App as a human business-user desktop entry for deterministic Lode workflows, not an Agent container.
changed_truth.task_model: Task = site skill + account identity + business input; Run = one execution attempt under the same Task.
changed_truth.ia: Left sidebar organizes Tasks by account identity then site skill; middle column is Task Thread with navigation rail and bottom fixed controls; right panel is contextual tabs.
changed_truth.visual_reference: docs/design/desktop-task-thread-direction.png is versioned as directional reference only, not a pixel spec or data contract.
changed_truth.design_contract: DESIGN.md records the desktop design contract for #93/#94/#95 consumers.

commands.rationale: docs-only checkpoint plus versioned image reference and item-specific carrier; no code, schemas, generated facts, runtime behavior, package manifests, dependencies, migrations, fixtures, or raw evidence handling.

issue_readback.source: gh issue view 92/96/97/98/99 and milestone 9 from prior PR setup
issue_readback.summary: ADR 0008 covers #92 checkpoint direction, #96 IA, #97 task/run/context model, #98 output/state display rules, and #99 desktop shell boundary.
